attributes.additional_details: Dogs are being bred on mass for profit and not cared for or terminated  as they are an inconvenience. Owners having licenses will prevent this. It'll also make it easier to locate missing dogs.
attributes.background: Everyone who has a dog should have a license to avoid dogs being injured and/or dying through neglect or mistreatment.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce Pet Licence for cats and dogs and require reporting cat collisions
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759752
